flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Lansdale School of Business fell 33% between 2021 and 2024 (82.6% → 55.6%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Lansdale School of Business fell 29% between 2021 and 2024 (131 → 93).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Lansdale School of Business rose 24% between 2006 and 2009 ($7.9k → $9.8k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Lansdale School of Business rose 12% between 2017 and 2020 ($12.1k → $13.5k).
